meta.title: School ERP API — Frontend handoff

authentication.note: Most routes require JWT. Role is enforced server-side (see roles on each endpoint). Cookie-based auth may be used where configured.

meta.cors: Server must allow your web origin via CORS_ORIGIN (comma-separated).
meta.parentPortal: Parent endpoints require valid childId for child-specific resources when documented in handler — never trust client-only IDs without server checks.
